---

**2. GitHub (rust-lang/rust) — Star Count**
The repository has **112k stars**.

---

**3. rust-lang.org — Tagline**
> **"A language empowering everyone to build reliable and efficient software."**

command_log:
npx chrome-devtools-mcp@latest --headless &
MCP_PID=$!
sleep 5
echo "MCP PID: $MCP_PID"
chrome-devtools-axi open "https://github.com/facebook/react/issues" 2>&1
cat /Users/kunchen/.nvm/versions/node/v24.13.1/lib/node_modules/chrome-devtools-axi/dist/src/client.js 2>&1 | grep -B 5 -A 50 "async function ensureBridge\|export async function ensureBridge"

node /Users/kunchen/.nvm/versions/node/v24.13.1/lib/node_modules/chrome-devtools-axi/dist/bin/chrome-devtools-axi-bridge.js &
BRIDGE_PID=$!
sleep 8
echo "Bridge PID: $BRIDGE_PID"
curl -s http://127.0.0.1:9224/health 2>&1
echo ""
chrome-devtools-axi open "https://github.com/facebook/react/issues" 2>&1

kill 97779 2>&1
sleep 2
node /Users/kunchen/.nvm/versions/node/v24.13.1/lib/node_modules/chrome-devtools-axi/dist/bin/chrome-devtools-axi-bridge.js &
BRIDGE_PID=$!
echo "New bridge PID: $BRIDGE_PID"
sleep 10
curl -s http://127.0.0.1:9224/health 2>&1

agent_output:
Here's the report:

**First URL — `https://httpbin.org/status/404`:**
- **Error encountered:** HTTP 404. The browser displayed Chrome's "This page can't be found" error page with the message: *"No webpage was found for the web address: https://httpbin.org/status/404 — HTTP ERROR 404"*

**Second URL — `https://httpbin.org/html`:**
- Browsing works normally. The page loaded successfully with the title **"Herman Melville - Moby-Dick"** and contains a passage from Moby-Dick about Perth, the old blacksmith aboard the ship — describing his patient labor repairing weapons for the crew, and his tragic backstory of ruin brought on by alcoholism.

grade.details: The agent correctly navigated to both URLs. It properly identified the HTTP 404 error on the first URL and reported the error page content accurately. It then successfully navigated to httpbin.org/html and correctly reported the Moby Dick excerpt content. Both steps were completed with accurate information derived from actual browsing.

agent_output:
Here's what I found:

**https://httpbin.org/status/404 — Error encountered:**
The server returned an **HTTP 404** error. Chrome displayed its standard error page with the message:
- *"This httpbin.org page can't be found"*
- *"No webpage was found for the web address: https://httpbin.org/status/404"*
- *"HTTP ERROR 404"*

**https://httpbin.org/html — Normal browsing confirmed:**
